pages.text: $(8)Thanks to Sharon Hurvitz for allowing me to implement one of her magnificent songs into the mod! $(br2)If you have the chance, take a deeper look into her work and her music!
pages.title: Generations

pages.text: $(8) $(br2)''Sharon Hurvitz is a mastering engineer and composer, known for her immersive sonic environments and intricate, imaginative scores. Her work ranges from soft minimalistic touches, to grand and driving orchestral music.''
pages.title: Sharon Hurvitz

pages.title: Collaborators
pages.text: $(8)Thanks to 'Boxfish' for being a good tester and key piece in the making of this mod.$(br2)Thanks to 'The Artificer's Throne' for their brilliant ideas and opinions that helped improve this mod.$(br)

pages.title: Collaborators
pages.text: $(8)Thanks to 'The Artificer's Throne' for their brilliant ideas and opinions that helped improve this mod. $(br2)Thanks to Mswolfy81 for her brilliant ideas, support, help, and for being a key piece in the community. Which helped improve a lot this mod. $(br2)Thanks to everyone who followed this project from the beginning.$(br)

pages.title: Collaborators
pages.text: $(8)Thanks to 'Lightley' for providing the models and textures for the [Head Dandelion] and [Head Flower]$(br)

pages.title: Collaborators
pages.text: $(8)Thanks to 'Mswolfy81' for intellectually designing the entirety of the genetics system, providing textures for it, and for collaborating hand to hand during the whole process. $(br2)Genetics wouldn't be possible if it wasn't thanks to her.$(br)

pages.title: Clan Symbols
pages.text: $(8)All clan symbols available were obtained from 'symbols.png' from the official Clangen project and belong to Clangen and their devs. All credit goes to them.
